no-wikipedia:Parque Marechal Carmona.notes: No standalone English Wikipedia article for Parque Marechal Carmona; the Cascais municipal park is only mentioned within the broader Portuguese Riviera article. WebSearch (en.wikipedia.org) returned only Cascais, Portuguese Riviera, and unrelated Marechal Carmona Dam / Parque do Carmo articles — none matches this specific garden.
